title: Preflight — bridge healthy, surface present, zero compile errors

steps.title: Goal
steps.body: Confirm Unity Open MCP is wired, healthy, and exposes the surface this template needs before any build work. The setup step runs the checks automatically; verify each result against the Expected list. Do not begin A-01 until preflight is green.

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: bridge_status reports the bridge as running (connected); not stopped/dead/unknown
capabilities returns a non-empty tool list
capabilities reports available: true for the groups this template depends on: core, gate-and-verify, typed-editor
manage_tools (action: list_groups) shows core, gate-and-verify, and typed-editor as active or available to this session
read_compile_errors reports zero compile errors at baseline

reset.note: Read-only checks; no project artifacts are created. Nothing to clean between runs.
